text_block_list.text:
One day after training, as I'm walking Biwa
Hayahide to her dorm just before curfew...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Welcome back, Hayahide! It's rare to see you out
and about at this late hour.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I was training heavily today, and—ah, are
you speaking in your capacity as dorm leader? I'm
sorry to come back so late.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, not at all! I adore the chance to welcome
back my ponies after a hard day's work, no matter
the time.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
By the by, did you happen to see Sweep and
Marvelous on your way here?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
They're not answering their phones. And as they
are among our younger residents, I can't help but
feel a bit... trepidatious.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
With good reason—we should search for them
immediately. I'll help, of course!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: My eternal gratitude to you both!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Might I suggest we split our efforts? You two
work together in search of one, and I shall look
for the other.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Right. Do you have any information on where
they might be?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Only that Marvelous went off on a so-called
"marvelous search," and Sweep set out to look for
magic ingredients.
choice_data_list: Sweep sounds easier to pin down.

Marvelous could be anywhere, so let's try to
find her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes, there are a limited number of items that
might be considered magic ingredients.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's take advantage of that to find Sweep as
soon as we can and bring her back.

In case they come back on their own, we leave a
note on the door for them to call the dorm
leader, and then we depart on our search.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Nope, that won't work. Ooh, and this one's the
wrong color!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sweep! There you are!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Eeeeek! Wh-what?! What're you doing in my
favorite gathering spot?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Looking all over for you, that's what! At Fuji's
request.
choice_data_list:
You're about to miss curfew! Come on, let's go
back to the dorm.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: For real? I had no idea it was so late!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
B-but, I don't care! I'm not going aaanywhere
until I find some medicinal herbs, and that's that!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Is something the matter? Perhaps we can help
you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You're not the sort of magical girl to simply break
rules for no reason, after all.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...Urk!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
Rrrg... Fine! You're right, I'm not! But my grandma
got a fever yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
And it won't come down, no matter what I do. So I
wanna try healing her with magic.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I see. But if you don't make it back to the dorm
before curfew, everyone's going to be worried
about you.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
They may even end up calling your grandmother.
That's certainly not what you want, right?

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: O-of course not!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Then, it sounds like you really should let us assist
in your search.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You can give us the most relevant information,
and we'll use that to narrow down potential
harvesting locations.
choice_data_list:
Then we can find those herbs and make it back
on time!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: ...O-okay, fine.

And so, thanks to Biwa Hayahide's logic and
wisdom, we locate the herbs in no time at all.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Sweep! I'm so glad you've returned home safe and
sound!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: Y-yeah, so, uh... Thanksforyourhelptoday. Byyye!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Goodness me! I don't believe I've ever heard her
say the word "thanks." What manner of spell did
you cast on her?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
No spell. I merely interjected myself into her
personal affairs.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
She reminds me of Brian when she was little. I
couldn't resist helping her.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Well, your "interjecting," is always a boon to me,
as well as the whole dorm.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Today certainly has been no exception. I give you
my thanks, Hayahide.

The slightest blush crawls across Biwa Hayahide's
face in response to the unexpected compliment
from Fuji Kiseki.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Good idea. She'll be the more difficult to track,
so considering that two heads are better than
one, we should take charge of finding her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's first identify any nearby locations which
could reasonably be described as "marvelous."

In case they come back on their own, we leave a
note on the door for them to call the dorm
leader, and then we depart on our search.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: She's not at the stage...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Not at the Three Goddesses statue, either. Could
she be inside somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's try to reason this out. What "marvelous"
places might we find indoors? The music room,
perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But with no one there right now, calling it
"marvelous" seems a bit inaccu—

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
How exquisitely red and marvelous! ☆ So
marvelously sparkly! ★

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Marvelous?!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Why, if it isn't Hayahide! What brings you
here? ☆

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I could ask you the same.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I heard you were on a "marvelous search," but I
still have yet to grasp what, exactly, that entails.

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
Well, um, I heard a marvelous rumor that if you
run around inside the school at night, a red light
chases you...

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text:
So I tried it, and it turns out it's true! I've been
having so much fun with it! ☆
choice_data_list: That... sounds a lot like a ghost.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Th-the existence of ghosts s-simply isn't
supported by any kind of scientific evidence!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But... for argument's sake, if they do exist, how...
might one go about dealing with them?
Hellooo? Hellooooo?

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Oh! It's the red light! ☆

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Gaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Marvelous Sunday
text_block_list.text: Whoa! ☆ You're really moving, Hayahide! ★
choice_data_list: Wait. This red light is no ghost, it's...

text_block_list.name: Security Guard
text_block_list.text: I'm so sorry. I didn't mean to scare you.

text_block_list.name: Security Guard
text_block_list.text:
Shouldn't you be heading home so you don't miss
curfew?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I believe I owe you both an apology.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I got a little spooked, I will admit, but that
doesn't excuse me for running off by myself.
choice_data_list: It's really nothing to worry about.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! All that matters is that our combined
efforts have brought Marvelous and Sweep back
home safe and sound.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Heh. But I must admit, never in my wildest dreams
would I have guessed you were afraid of ghosts!
How adorable!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Urk! I-I mean, who isn't scared of ghosts?! Ghosts
are scary!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Almost nothing is known about their behavior!
What are you supposed to do if you see one?!
choice_data_list: But it was just a security guard, so it's fine!
But it was just a security guard, so it's fine!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And thank goodness for that. If it were anything
else, I don't think I'd be getting any sleep tonight
at all!

And with that, Biwa Hayahide lets out a deep sigh
of genuine relief, slightly embarrassed, but
ultimately no worse for wear.
